name: NewSecGap Phase 58 — NS 20 CSVs Per-Row Deep Research
description: Bring data/outputs/ns/*.final.csv (20 Phase 57 files) from ~45% to ~80%+ per-row evidence confidence. Three workstreams: (Q1-A) per-row now_applicable_native verification with specific feature evidence; (Q1-B) conditional row patches; (Q1-C) key still_not_applicable verification; (Q2) per-service new-row audit for 2025-2026 features. No CSV recreation. Enrich in-place only.
confidenceGap: All rows have MCSB baseline URL (Phase 57 bulk backfill) but lack per-row specific feature evidence: GA date, ARM property, customer enable steps, service-specific source URL. Q2 new-row audit not done per service.

readFirst.why: Full phase log through Phase 57, scope gates
Section 5 ns/ inventory, Section 11 delivery table — updated Phase 57
20 .final.csv files to enrich. Read header + sample rows before writing.

csvSchema.noteUpdatePattern: Append specific evidence to existing notes — do NOT replace. Pattern: '{existing} | {specific_evidence}. Source: {url}'
csvSchema.supplementNotePattern: v2 gap: {description}. {conditional_logic_if_any}. Source: {url} | Q2-{group} WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA.

verdictTaxonomy.changeRule: Do NOT change verdict without MCSB baseline evidence. Q1 workstreams = notes enrichment only. Exception: if Q1-C research confirms a still_not_applicable has changed to now_applicable_native, update verdict AND add source.

targetFiles.issue: duplicate NS-2 Azure Private Link row — remove one
legacy CDN — 3 rows intentional, conditional rows need logic

workstreams.name: Per-Row now_applicable_native Verification
workstreams.description: 14 now_applicable_native rows across 11 services need specific per-row evidence beyond the generic MCSB baseline URL applied in Phase 57.

subgroups.name: NS-2 Azure Private Link — 10 services
subgroups.exaQueryPattern: {ServiceName} Azure Private Link private endpoint GA ARM property privateEndpointConnections
subgroups.targetNoteContent: Azure Private Link GA: private endpoint supported ({armProperty}). Customer creates private endpoint in target VNet; service assigns private IP. Public access can be disabled via {publicNetworkAccessProperty}. Source: {specific_doc_url} | MCSB v3 baseline: {baseline_url}

subgroups.name: IM-7 Conditional Access — 4 services
subgroups.exaQueryPattern: {ServiceName} Entra ID Conditional Access data plane MFA enforced GA 2024 2025
subgroups.targetNoteContent: Entra ID Conditional Access now applicable: service integrates with Entra ID for data plane auth; Conditional Access policies (MFA, compliant device, location) apply via App Registration. Not an ARM property on the service — configured in Entra ID portal. Source: {url} | MCSB v3 baseline: {baseline_url}

specialCase.issue: Duplicate NS-2 Azure Private Link row (two rows with same asb_control_id+feature_name). Remove second occurrence. Update first with specific evidence.
specialCase.action: In phase58_individual_patches.py: dedup on (asb_control_id, feature_name) before writing

rows.action: Add specific note: Azure CDN classic does not have publicNetworkAccess ARM toggle. Conditional logic: disable requires WAF policy with block rules OR migration to Azure Front Door Standard/Premium. Source: {url}
Verify CDN classic Private Link origin GA status June 2026. Add source URL. Conditional: Private Link for origins requires CDN Premium tier; not available in Standard.
rows.exaQuery: Azure CDN classic Private Link origin private endpoint GA 2024 2025

rows.feat: Forced Tunneling for Virtual WAN Secure Hubs via NVA/SASE
rows.action: Verify ARM property path for routing configuration. Currently: properties.routingConfiguration.propagatedRouteTables — confirm or correct.

workstreams.name: Key still_not_applicable Verification
workstreams.description: Verify Phase 52 N/A verdicts still hold June 2026. If flipped: update verdict to now_applicable_native + add source.

rows.exaQuery: Azure Notification Hubs VNet integration supported 2025 2026
Azure File Sync private endpoint GA supported 2025
Azure Database Migration Service private endpoint GA 2025
Azure Peering Service Private Link endpoint 2025
Azure Traffic Manager Private Link private endpoint 2025
rows.expectedResult: still N/A — DNS-based GTM, no data plane

rows.exaQuery: Azure Load Balancer as Private Link consumer 2025
rows.expectedResult: still N/A — LB is VNet infrastructure, not PaaS consumer

workstreams.name: Per-Service New-Row Audit 2025-2026
workstreams.description: 5 grouped searches for new 2025-2026 NS features per service cluster. Add SUPPLEMENT rows if new features found.

supplementRowFormat.notes: v2 gap: {description}. Source: {url} | Q2-{group} WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA.

queries.query: Azure App Service Functions Logic Apps new network security NS-1 NS-2 NS-7 Flex Consumption private endpoint 2025 2026
queries.focus: Flex Consumption plan private networking GA, Logic Apps Standard VNet injection improvements

queries.query: Azure Virtual Desktop AVD new NS security private link session host RDP Shortpath 2025 2026

queries.focus: Databricks Unity Catalog network isolation, ADF managed private endpoints improvements

queries.query: Azure Event Hubs Event Grid Cognitive Search Cognitive Services new private endpoint NS-2 2025 2026
queries.focus: Event Hubs Kafka private access, Event Grid namespace private link, AI Foundry integration

queries.query: Azure File Sync Notification Hubs Load Balancer NAT Gateway Traffic Manager new network security 2025 2026
queries.focus: Infra/legacy services — low probability of new features

scriptsToWrite.purpose: Patch now_applicable_native and conditional rows with specific per-row evidence
scriptsToWrite.pattern: Mirror scripts/phase56_individual_patches.py — PATCHES list with (slug, ctrl, feat_fragment, note_to_append)
includes: 10 NS-2 Azure Private Link now_applicable_native rows — specific ARM property + source
4 IM-7 Conditional Access now_applicable_native rows — specific Entra CA note
azurecdn 2 conditional rows — conditional logic notes
appservice duplicate NS-2 row dedup — keep first, remove second

scriptsToWrite.purpose: Add Q2 new SUPPLEMENT rows for 2025-2026 features not yet in rows
scriptsToWrite.pattern: Mirror scripts/phase57_supplement_rows.py — idempotent, skip if asb_control_id already present
scriptsToWrite.condition: Only write if Q2 queries find at least one genuinely new feature

executionSteps.action: Read: CLAUDE.md, ado/activity.log (tail), data/outputs/context.md, all 20 final.csv files (header + sample rows)
WebSearch/Exa batch (parallel): 10 NS-2 Private Link searches + 4 IM-7 Conditional Access searches
WebSearch: azurecdn CDN classic Private Link GA verification
WebSearch batch (parallel): Q2-A through Q2-E (5 queries)
Write scripts/phase58_individual_patches.py with all Q1 patch findings
Write scripts/phase58_supplement_rows.py IF Q2 found new features
Run quality gate — all 20 must PASS
git add -f data/outputs/ns/ scripts/phase58_*.py && git commit
STOP — do not start IM domain or Session 7 without user confirmation

passCriteria: Zero bad verdicts (verdict not in allowed set)
Zero now_applicable_native without URL in notes
azurecdn exception: 3 rows — max 3 uncovered acceptable
appservice: no duplicate NS-2 Azure Private Link rows
qualityGate.command:
python3 -c "import csv,pathlib
ALLOWED={'implemented','now_applicable_native','upgraded_implemented','still_not_applicable','conditional','not_applicable_paas','not_applicable_arm'}
slugs=['appservice','azurecdn','cognitivesearch','cognitiveservices','databasemigration','databricks','datafactory','eventgrid','eventhubs','filesync','functions','loadbalancer','logicapps','natgateway','notificationhubs','peeringservice','trafficmanager','virtualdesktop','virtualnetwork','virtualwan']
all_ok=True
for s in slugs:
    rows=list(csv.DictReader(open(f'data/outputs/ns/{s}.final.csv')))
    bad={r['verdict_2025'] for r in rows}-ALLOWED
    no_url=[r for r in rows if r['verdict_2025']=='now_applicable_native' and 'http' not in r.get('notes','')]
    uncov=[r for r in rows if 'http' not in r.get('notes','') and 'Source' not in r.get('notes','') and not any(x in r.get('notes','').lower() for x in ['infrastructure','azure platform','no customer','not applicable','monitoring service'])]
    ok=not bad and not no_url and len(uncov)<5
    if not ok: all_ok=False
    print(f'[{"OK" if ok else "FAIL"}] {s:<22} rows={len(rows):>3} no_url={len(no_url):>2} uncov={len(uncov):>3}')
print()
print('QUALITY GATE:','PASS' if all_ok else 'FAIL')"

constraints: NO verdict change without MCSB baseline evidence — Q1 is notes enrichment; only Q1-C can flip still_not_applicable if evidence found
NO CSV recreation — enrich in-place only
git add with -f flag required for data/outputs/ns/
azurecdn: 3 rows ONLY — do not regenerate
appservice: 43 rows all valid — only remove ONE duplicate NS-2 row
virtualnetwork: NS-2-SUPPLEMENT already exists — do NOT add again (idempotent guard in supplement script)
virtualwan: NS-7-SUPPLEMENT-VIRTUALWAN already exists — same guard
Cost hook: ignore — user standing green light
successCriteria: All now_applicable_native rows: specific feature evidence in notes (not just generic baseline URL)
azurecdn: conditional logic documented for both NS-2 rows
